scenario.name: Carrier Cancel SDP
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:800@lab.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:0555123456@etisalat.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:800@lab.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:carrier@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:971501234567@etisalat.local> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=carrier 1 1 IN IP4 10.10.10.20 s=Fake Carrier SDP Cancel c=IN IP4 10.10.10.20 t=0 0 m=audio 5064 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

CANCEL sip:800@lab.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:0555123456@etisalat.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:800@lab.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 CANCEL Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
ACK sip:800@lab.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
